title: onoclea hintonii
intro: Onoclea hintonii, also known as Hinton's fern, is a species of fern native to Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Onoclea hintonii include alleviating coughs, reducing fever, and soothing irritated throats. Herbal preparations often involve infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to make a tea or decoction that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
